name: Chocolate Loaded Drip Cake
description: White vanilla buttercream cake with a rich dark chocolate drip, topped with various chocolate bar segments, silver pearls, and a gold 'Happy Birthday' topper.

name: Disney Princess Purple Theme Cake
description: A beautiful lilac-frosted cake featuring a Disney Princess edible image, decorated with star sprinkles, purple pearls, and a floral gold topper.

name: Monochrome Sphere Celebration Cake
description: Elegant white buttercream cake styled with black and white chocolate spheres, silver sugar pearls, and a custom edible center graphic.

name: Paw Patrol Adventure Kids' Cake
description: Bright blue ridged buttercream cake with green 'grass' frosting, featuring Paw Patrol character toppers and colorful paw print decals.

name: Pink Oreo & Chocolate Drip Cake
description: Pink-tinted vanilla sponge cake, smooth pink buttercream frosting, white chocolate ganache drip, topped with Oreo cookies, chocolate bar segments, pink wafers, and multicolored sugar pearls.

name: Classic Graduation Black Forest
description: Rich black forest cake topped with fresh strawberries and a custom 'Congrats' message.

name: Sunset Orange Ombre Cake
description: Vibrant yellow-to-orange ombre design with elegant whipped cream rosettes and custom messaging.

name: Celebration Square Sheet Cake
description: Generous square cake with purple and peach buttercream swirls, topped with rainbow sprinkles.

name: Authentic Calabash Cultural Cake
description: Hyper-realistic traditional calabash design featuring hand-sculpted cowrie shells and beaded detailing. The ultimate Ruracio centerpiece.

name: Gold Stencil Wedding Collection
description: A grand multi-cake display featuring intricate gold-stenciled patterns, navy floral toppers, and tiered elegance.

name: Modern Floral Celebration Duo
description: Clean, minimalist white cakes topped with bold, oversized navy and red floral sculptures.

name: Pink Rosette Birthday Special
description: Classic pink and white cream rosettes with rainbow sprinkles and a custom gold birthday topper.
